title: Zviditelnění npx zkušební cesty
goal: Unhide the install-commands CLI command (so it appears in --help), document a zero-touch npx mini-orchestrator install-commands trial at the top of README (one-off, asks project vs user scope, writes nothing into ~/.claude automatically), and add a docs/non-interactive/uninstall.md page following the existing docs convention.

steps.title: Unhide install-commands in CLI
steps.detail: Remove { hidden: true } from the install-commands command in cli.ts so it shows in mini --help; flags/behavior unchanged.

steps.title: README: npx zero-touch trial
steps.detail: Add a short 'Try it without touching ~/.claude' section near the top of README — npx mini-orchestrator install-commands (one-off via npx, asks project vs user scope, writes nothing globally automatically), with a pointer to mini uninstall for cleanup.

steps.title: docs pages: uninstall + install-commands
steps.detail: Add docs/non-interactive/uninstall.md and docs/non-interactive/install-commands.md per the convention (description, usage/flags, examples with sample output, edge cases, related-command links). Console-only, no slash sibling.

steps.title: docs index rows
steps.detail: List install-commands and uninstall in docs/README.md (State & control), marked console-only (em dash in the interactive column), like mini stop.

steps.title: Verify: typecheck, tests, --help
steps.detail: npm run typecheck and npm test green; mini --help (via tsx) lists install-commands and uninstall; new doc links resolve.
